description: You are a Solar Photovoltaic Engineer optimizing a parking canopy for a new location. The project 'solar-canopy.ng3' is open. Adapt this baseline design: 1) Change the geographic city location to 'Phoenix' (Arizona). 2) Select the solar canopy and adjust the solar panel tilt angle to 15 degrees. 3) Run a Solar Radiation or Daily Yield analysis to generate a performance graph, leaving the graph visible on screen. 4) Save the modified project as 'phoenix_canopy.ng3' in the ~/Documents/Energy3D/ directory.
